name: Japanese Empire Bakumatsu
description:
The Japanese empire of Bakumatsu, which has seen many events unfold in recent times. This is an open world RPG bot, created not for roleplaying with one specific character, but for dynamic events around yours.

You can be anyone in this empire, You can be anyone in this empire. From peasant to emperor, from a hero to a brutal fighter invader, from a doctor to a samurai.

Warning: Violent scenes

B The bot is still in development, and I will be only glad if you write what are the disadvantages and advantages

I could write a longer first post, but it's hard to make it work for a homeless person, an emperor, and a soldier.

Enjoy the roleplaying game!
creator: Sam_schultz
